nodes.text: Yimirira ku Cervical cancer. Nnyinza okukuyamba otya?
Ebikolebwa bisobola okuba: okwawukira okw'enjawulo mu mwezi, obulumi mu ddovu, oba discharge etali ya busa. Mu kaseera akasinga, tewali bimala ku mulamwa.
Obukolwa bungi buvudde ku HPV (human papillomavirus) era bwetegereza obutonotono obulina bwe bukyaliwo.
Eby'okulukusa risk by'amanyi: okuyitamu okugezaako mu bugya obungi, okunywa sigareeti, okuba n'obusungu mu mubiri, n'okutabadde okusuzumibwa.
Okukendeeza: HPV vaccine, okusuzumibwa obutereevu (Pap smear/HPV test), n'obujulizi ku by'obulamu obulamu obulungi.
Okusuzuma kusaanya obubonero bw'amasanyalaze ku zingaala zangye. Gabana n'ekwata ku kliniki yo ku eby'obulamu ebikulu ku ngeri gye balaga.
Obusobozi bw'okusuzuma buva ku myaka n'ebifo; jjukira okwogera ne kliniki yaabwe oba okuva ku gavumenti y'eggwanga.
Obujjanjabi buyinza okuba kw'ogw'obukadde obuto okusinga okulambulula, oba obujjanjabi obw'amaanyi ng'okutwala ensawo, radiotherapy n'ebirala.
Obuyambi nga counseling, amaka ga patient, ne social services byetaaga okukolagana mu kutegeera n'okukolera wansi w'obujjanjabi.
Londa kliniki y'eby'obulamu eyaffe oba obuyambi bwa NGO ez'okusuzuma ne vaccination. Basobola okukuyamba mu kusaba obujjanjabi.
